hero.title: Organizing your mind is our **only job**.
hero.description: Our purpose is to simplify and harmonize people's lives, promoting **organization and minimalism** for a **lighter and more productive** mind.

advantage_01.title: Track your habits evolution
advantage_01.description: With Victus Journal you can track your habits evolution day by day.

advantage_02.title: See in a board where you can improve
advantage_02.description: With Victus Journal you can see in a board where you can improve.

advantage_03.title: Have a streak of your habits
advantage_03.description: With Victus Journal you can have a streak of your habits.

advantage_04.title: Have graphs of your habits
advantage_04.description: With Victus Journal you can have graphs of your habits.

desktop.title: Desktop Platform
desktop.description: Our desktop platform is now available for use.

mobile.title: Mobile Platform
mobile.description: Our mobile apps are under construction and will be ready for use soon.

world.title: World Foundation Integration
world.description: Integration with World Chain is coming soon, bringing challenges, integrations, and WLD token rewards!

cta.title: You're one step away from having total control of your behavior!
cta.description: Within the platform, you have the opportunity to know where to improve in your life and achieve your goals!

proof_01.title: How can you track your habits evolution?
proof_01.description:
Within the platform, you have your journal where you need to fill in completed habits daily.

Over time, you'll start to notice where you fail more and where you're consistent.
